things.name: Pha That Luang
things.description: Laos's national symbol - a 45m gold-covered stupa said to contain a relic of the Buddha

things.name: Patuxai (Victory Gate)
things.description: Laotian Arc de Triomphe built with US-donated concrete, with city views from the top

things.name: Buddha Park (Xieng Khuan)
things.description: Surreal park 25km from the city with 200 Buddhist and Hindu sculptures

things.name: Wat Si Saket
things.description: Vientiane's oldest surviving temple with 6,840 miniature Buddha images in the cloister walls

things.name: Haw Pha Kaew
things.description: Former royal temple housing the Emerald Buddha before it was taken to Thailand

things.name: Mekong Riverside at Sunset
things.description: Sunset drinks on the Mekong River bank with views across to Thailand

things.name: Morning Market (Talat Sao)
things.description: Multi-storey market with Laotian textiles, silver jewellery and electronics

things.name: Vang Vieng Day Trip
things.description: Kayaking, tubing and caving in the dramatic karst landscape 150km north

things.name: Cope Visitor Centre
things.description: Moving exhibition on unexploded ordnance remaining from the Secret War in Laos

things.name: Lao National Museum
things.description: Laotian history from prehistoric times through French colonialism and the Pathet Lao revolution
